models.name: Fisher Equation
models.short_description: The foundational identity linking nominal rates, real rates, and expected inflation — the bridge between nominal and inflation-linked bond markets.
models.key_insight: Nominal rates embed both real compensation and inflation expectations.

models.name: Breakeven Inflation
models.short_description: Market-implied inflation from the spread between nominal and inflation-linked bonds — where TIPS and nominals break even.
models.key_insight: Breakeven = inflation expectation + risk premium + liquidity premium.
